subtasks.description: Query sam_licenses MongoDB to retrieve current Adobe contracts by product line, including contract end dates, seat counts, and licensing terms
Query consumption_facts SQL warehouse to extract Q4 2024 actual Adobe spend by product line and compute 90-day usage trend (current vs. prior period growth rate) to identify usage momentum

Reconcile current contracted state (from sam_licenses) with Q4 spend and 90-day usage trends (from consumption_facts). Classify each product line as expand, hold, or reduce based on: utilization gap (spend vs. licensed capacity), usage acceleration/deceleration, and contract expiry proximity. Produce renewal trajectory with seat/cost recommendations for each product line.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks, minimum for the query scope: (1) mongo_query (small tier) retrieves current Adobe licensing state — straightforward single-collection query. (2) sql_gen (mid tier) computes Q4 spend and 90-day trend — requires multi-CTE or window function logic to calculate YoY/period-over-period growth and trend slope. (3) cross_recon (frontier tier) reconciles two sources (MongoDB contracts + SQL spend/usage) to build renewal posture classification and trajectory. Cross_recon runs downstream of both sources and must synthesize utilization gaps, momentum signals, and contract timing to produce actionable expand/hold/reduce recommendations. This is complex multi-signal reconciliation requiring frontier capability; it is NOT a separate policy_action because the query does not ask for compliance/governance approval, only strategic renewal posture guidance.

output.sql: WITH q4_spend AS (SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) AS q4_2024_spend, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS q4_total_seats FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY product), current_90 AS (SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) AS current_usage, AVG(daily_active_seats) AS current_avg_seats FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY product), prior_90 AS (SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) AS prior_usage, AVG(daily_active_seats) AS prior_avg_seats FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days' AND event_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY product) SELECT q.product, q.q4_2024_spend, q.q4_total_seats, c.current_usage, p.prior_usage, c.current_avg_seats, p.prior_avg_seats, CASE WHEN p.prior_usage > 0 THEN ROUND(((c.current_usage - p.prior_usage) / p.prior_usage) * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS usage_growth_rate_pct, CASE WHEN p.prior_avg_seats > 0 THEN ROUND(((c.current_avg_seats - p.prior_avg_seats) / p.prior_avg_seats) * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS seat_growth_rate_pct FROM q4_spend q LEFT JOIN current_90 c ON q.product = c.product LEFT JOIN prior_90 p ON q.product = p.product ORDER BY q.q4_2024_spend DESC
